chunks.heading: Purpose
chunks.text: Diagnostics helps investigate broken workspace, worktree, and runtime states. Use it when actions fail, status is inconsistent, or a worktree looks corrupted.

chunks.heading: Recovery actions
chunks.text: Use built-in recovery flows to repair metadata mismatches and command failures. Prefer guided recovery before manual filesystem edits.

chunks.heading: Corrupted worktree handling
chunks.text: If a worktree is corrupted, save important local changes, inspect diagnostics output, and recreate the worktree if repair cannot restore a clean state.
